title: median function breaks when the column contains NULL values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_median ( id UInt64, value Float64, category String );
ALTER TABLE test_median UPDATE value = NULL WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT quantile(0.5)(value) FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B';
SELECT quantile(0.5)(value) FROM test_median WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: median function fails with NULL values in column
